chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 732 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 26.06.2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None has appeared on behalf of the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. The same position persisted on 19.03.2024 and again on 07.05.2024. Although an urgency application was filed and entertained on 18.03.2025, whereafter the matter was fixed for 03.06.2025 in the presence of learned Counsel for the petitioner, he remained absent on the said date as well. In the interest of justice, and by way of a last opportunity, the matter was adjourned for today. However, despite issuance of an intimation notice, the petition remains unrepresented. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
